title: magnolia ovalis
intro: Magnolia ovalis, also known as the Philippine Magnolia, is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called magnolol, with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Magnolia ovalis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its role in supporting immune function and reducing stress. Magnolia ovalis is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is traditionally used in folk medicine in the Philippines.
